calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-15-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Petitioner, Catherine Elizabeth Floyd was sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing name to Elizabeth Floyd Rowell. Decree signed in open court.
